name: Focaccia with Tomato & Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix flour, salt, and sugar.
2. Add warm water and olive oil to the dry ingredients. Mix until dough forms.
3. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead for about 5 minutes.
4. Place dough in an oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise for 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. In a greased baking dish, arrange tomato slices and basil leaves.
7. Scatter Parmesan cheese over the tomatoes.
8. Roll out dough to fit the baking dish.
9. Place dough on top of the tomato mixture, pressing down gently.
10. Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Turn off heat and let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
